refactor(langfuse/chatapp): - Fix 1: _patched_log function signature mismatch   - Location: plugins-langfuse_tracing.py   - Problem: monkey-patch function only accepts 2 parameters, but the original function has 3 parameters (including the default parameter log_path)   - Fix: add log_path=None parameter and pass it to the original function - Fix 2: Agentmain module import failure   - Location: frontends-chatapp_common.py   - Problem: frontends directory cannot be imported into the agentmain of the upper directory   - Fix: Add the parent directory to sys.path at the beginning of the file
